introSection: Spirou Racing is a steel roller coaster located at Parc Spirou Provence in Monteux, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Spirou Racing opened in 2018 as Parc Spirou's signature roller coaster.

fullText:
Spirou Racing is a steel roller coaster located at Parc Spirou Provence in Monteux, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

Spirou Racing opened in 2018 as Parc Spirou's signature roller coaster.
